summary: 同步锁机制(acquireLifecycleLockSync/releaseLifecycleLockSync)：与control-plane/locks.js的异步锁并存，用于stop等需要确切持有锁的操作；避免启动独占端口冲突的严格校验(assertVerifiedStopOwnership)

findings.summary: 同步锁机制(acquireLifecycleLockSync/releaseLifecycleLockSync)：与control-plane/locks.js的异步锁并存，用于stop等需要确切持有锁的操作；避免启动独占端口冲突的严格校验(assertVerifiedStopOwnership)
